description: Declarative cross-run save/load. Round-trips named world.state keys through the existing storage bridge (no host JS, no wire-protocol change): restores declared keys on boot (live value wins) and writes on change or interval. Keys/slot/cadence come from manifest.persist, overridable per-instance.

keys.description: world.state keys to persist (defaults to manifest.persist.keys).

slot.description: Storage slot/namespace suffix for the save blob.

everySeconds.description: Autosave cadence in seconds (0 = save on change only).
